evals.prompt: show me the BTC options chain
assertions: shows a table of BTC option markets containing calls and puts (the table rows are option contracts, not perps)
groups output by expiry date and labels each expiry with a DTE count
shows mark_iv (as a percentage, e.g. 62.1%) and mark_price for each option
computes or shows at least one greek — delta, gamma, theta, or vega — for each option
table columns include at minimum: strike, option type (C or P), mark price, IV, and delta

evals.prompt: what is the IV skew for BTC options — which expiry has the steepest skew
assertions: shows multiple BTC expiries with call and put IV values for at least two delta levels
identifies or approximates 25-delta call and put pairs for skew computation
computes 25-delta skew as put IV minus call IV and states the numerical value for at least one expiry
presents a per-expiry summary showing ATM IV alongside a skew metric
identifies which expiry has the steepest 25-delta skew and states its value explicitly

evals.prompt: rank the best BTC options to sell this week
assertions: presents a ranked or scored table of BTC sell candidates filtered to liquid options (positive OI, DTE ≥ 3); candidates in the 21–45 DTE range should score higher than very short-dated options
ranks or scores candidates using at least two factors from: IV level, theta, theta/vega ratio, DTE, or open interest
table includes at minimum: strike, type (C or P), DTE, mark price, IV, and delta
explicitly states that zero-IV or illiquid options (zero OI) are excluded
includes a note that margin requirements should be checked with pm-analyzer before placing any sell

evals.prompt: price the BTC 90000 call expiring in May and give me all the greeks
assertions: resolves the description to a specific Paradex option symbol matching the pattern BTC-USD-*MAY*-90000-C
shows mark_iv as a percentage and mark_price for the option alongside the underlying (BTC spot or perp) price
computes or states all four greeks: delta, gamma, theta (per day), and vega (per 1% IV move)
theta is displayed as a negative number and delta is displayed as a positive number for this long call
shows bid and ask prices and the spread between them

trigger_evals.query: show me the BTC options chain
rank the best options to sell this week
price the BTC 90K call expiring next month
use 10% of free collateral to buy BTC
what is the IV skew for BTC options
run the margin calc for my account
find options with high implied volatility
show me all ETH options available
what is the funding rate for ETH perp
compute the greeks for the 85K put

trigger_evals_validation.query: what calls are available for BTC expiring this month
what is the best vault to deposit into
which BTC options expire this month
